title: Bridge Essay: Default Mode Network Functional Connectivity As a Transdiagnostic Biomarker of Cognitive Function.
concept: Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

**Default Mode Network Functional Connectivity As a Transdiagnostic Biomarker of Cognitive Function.** - Biol Psychiatry Cogn Neurosci Neuroimaging (2025). DOI: 10.1016/j.bpsc.2024.12.016. PMID: 39798799. The default mode network (DMN) is intricately linked with processes such as self-referential thinking, episodic memory recall, goal-directed cognition, self-projection, and theory of mind. In recent years, there has been a surge in the number of studies examining its functional connectivity, particularly its relationship with frontoparietal networks involved in top-down attention, executive function, and cognitive control.
